hard_constraints.locality_rule: late11 family only, plus at most one adjacent late10/late11 variant

candidate_specs.name: late11_yneg_xpair_return_then_zpair_pos_med
candidate_specs.rationale: Reference incumbent from the previous branch: y-negative x-pair closed loop first, then the medium z-pair. Reused here as the fine-grid anchor.

candidate_specs.name: late11_zpair_pos_med_then_yneg_xpair_return
candidate_specs.rationale: Whole-motif reverse-order reference kept in-batch so the fine-grid can be read against the already-known order sensitivity.

candidate_specs.name: late11_zwrap_yneg_xpair_return
candidate_specs.rationale: Local order variant: open the z-loop, run the yneg-xpair while staying inside that late z excursion, then close the z-loop. Same total motif budget as the incumbent, but different local order and state occupancy.

candidate_specs.name: late11_yneg_xpair_d6_then_zpair_d8
candidate_specs.rationale: Mild rebalance at fixed 70 s insertion budget: strengthen the yneg-xpair dwell slightly (6 s per step) and lighten the z-pair dwell slightly (8 s per step).

candidate_specs.name: late11_yneg_xpair_d7_then_zpair_d6
candidate_specs.rationale: Further fixed-budget rebalance toward the yneg-xpair component: x-pair dwell 7 s, z-pair dwell 6 s.

candidate_specs.name: late11_yneg_xpair_d8_then_zpair_d4
candidate_specs.rationale: Strongest fixed-budget tilt toward the yneg-xpair component tested here: x-pair dwell 8 s, z-pair dwell 4 s.

candidate_specs.name: late11_yneg_xpair_outerhold_then_zpair_pos_med
candidate_specs.rationale: Same total 70 s as the incumbent, but reallocate x-pair dwell away from inner-open/inner-close holds and concentrate it on the outer sweep/return states.

candidate_specs.name: late11_yneg_xpair_then_zpair_pos_frontload
candidate_specs.rationale: Pre/post allocation tweak at fixed 70 s: keep the incumbent motif order, but push the z-pair dwell entirely onto the excursion half (out=20 s, return=0 s) instead of splitting it evenly.

candidate_specs.name: late10_zpair_pos_med_then_late11_yneg_xpair_return
candidate_specs.rationale: Single adjacent-anchor local variant: move the z-pair one anchor earlier (node 10), keep the yneg-xpair at node 11, and preserve the faithful12 base skeleton everywhere else.

finegrid_summary.materiality_verdict: partly yes — the fine-grid narrowed the mean gap by a meaningful amount, but did not fully beat the old best.

scientific_conclusion: The local late11 fine-grid found a modestly better faithful12-base candidate (late11_yneg_xpair_outerhold_then_zpair_pos_med) than the previous incumbent. However, the branch still does not beat the old best legal result; Ka2_y remains the max ceiling and the remaining mean gap is not fully closed.
